upload.title: Upload Recording
upload.uploadDescription: Upload an audio or video recording to process with AI
upload.selectFileError: Please select a file to upload
upload.unsupportedFileType: Unsupported file type. Please upload mp3, mp4, wav, m4a, or webm files.
upload.dropOrBrowse: Drop your recording here or click to browse

summary.noSummaryAvailable: No summary available yet. Generate one now to get insights.
summary.useReprocessHint: Use the reprocess button above to generate a summary.
summary.summaryAfterTranscription: Summary will be generated after transcription is complete.
summary.editSummaryDescription: Edit the AI-generated summary. Each line will become a separate item. Changes will be tracked in version history.
summary.overviewPlaceholder: A brief paragraph summarizing the meeting...

page.allRecordingsDescription: View and manage all recordings across all projects in your organization
page.recordMeetingDescription: Record audio directly from your browser with live transcription
page.noProjectsDescription: You need to create a project first before you can record. Projects help organize your recordings.

error.recordingErrorDescription: The recording interface encountered an error. Please check your microphone permissions and try again.

actions.archiveDescription: This will archive {title}. Archived recordings won't appear in your main recording list, but will remain accessible via the Archived Recordings view.
actions.restoreDescription: This will restore {title} and make it active again.
actions.deleteWarning: This action CANNOT be undone. This will permanently delete:
actions.deleteItem4: All extracted action items and tasks
actions.deleteConfirmLabel: Please type DELETE or the exact recording title to confirm:
actions.deleteConfirmError: Please type "DELETE" or the exact recording title to confirm deletion
actions.editDescription: Update your recording information. Changes will be reflected immediately.
actions.moveDescription: Move "{title}" to another project. This will update all related data including embeddings.
actions.moveConfirmation: The recording will be moved to {name}. All related data including chat embeddings will be updated.
actions.reprocessDescription: This will regenerate the transcription, summary, and tasks for "{title}". Your existing insights will be backed up before reprocessing.
actions.reprocessItem1: Current insights will be safely backed up
actions.reprocessItem2: AI will re-analyze the recording with latest models
actions.reprocessItem3: Summary and tasks will be regenerated
actions.reprocessItem4: You'll receive a notification when complete
actions.reprocessNoteText: This process may take a few minutes depending on the recording length.
actions.reprocessSuccessDescription: AI insights are being regenerated. You'll receive a notification when complete.

bulkMove.title: Move Multiple Recordings
bulkMove.moveDescription: Move {count, plural, one {# recording} other {# recordings}} to another project. All related data including embeddings will be updated.
bulkMove.recordingsSelected: {count, plural, one {# recording} other {# recordings}} selected
bulkMove.moveButton: Move {count, plural, one {# Recording} other {# Recordings}}
bulkMove.movedSuccessfully: {count, plural, one {# recording} other {# recordings}} moved successfully
bulkMove.recordingsFailed: {count, plural, one {# recording} other {# recordings}} failed
bulkMove.moveConfirmation: The recordings will be moved to {name}. All related data including chat embeddings will be updated.

summaryHistory.title: Summary Version History
summaryHistory.description: Track all changes made to this summary over time.
summaryHistory.futureEdits: Future edits will be recorded here.

pii.title: PII Redaction
pii.description: Detect and redact personal data from transcriptions
pii.noPiiDetected: No PII detected. Click "Detect PII" to scan the transcription.
pii.confirmRedactionDescription: Are you sure you want to redact this PII?

consent.consentDescription: Before starting the recording, you must obtain consent from all participants. This is required for compliance with GDPR and HIPAA regulations.
consent.consentReq1: All participants must explicitly consent to being recorded
consent.consentReq2: Consent can be revoked at any time
consent.consentReq3: Consent status will be tracked and audited
consent.consentConfirm: I confirm that I have obtained explicit consent from all participants before starting this recording.
consent.consentManagementDescription: Track and manage participant consent for this recording
consent.addParticipantDescription: Add a participant and grant consent for this recording
consent.addParticipantsHint: Add participants to track their consent status

filters.title: Filters
filters.noRecordingsMatchingFilters: No recordings found matching your filters

session.createProjectFirst: Create a project first to start recording.
session.selectProjectLabel: Select a project for this recording
session.selectProjectToStart: Select a project to start recording
session.directBrowserRecording: Direct audio recording from your browser
session.navigationGuardDescription: A recording is in progress. If you leave this page, the current recording will be lost. Are you sure you want to continue?
session.pauseToSwitchMic: Pause the recording to switch microphone

recovery.title: Incomplete recording found
recovery.description: A recording was found that was started {age} ago with {chunks} {chunkLabel}. Would you like to recover or discard it?

transcriptionPanel.title: Live Transcription
transcriptionPanel.subtitle: Real-time speech-to-text
transcriptionPanel.startRecordingToSee: Start a recording to see live transcription
transcriptionPanel.textAppearsHere: Text will appear here as you speak
transcriptionPanel.speaker: Speaker {number}

player.videoNotSupported: Your browser does not support the video player.
player.audioNotSupported: Your browser does not support the audio player.
player.playbackNotSupported: Playback not supported for this file type

transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.processingTime: This may take a few minutes depending on the recording length.
transcription.failedMessage: An error occurred while transcribing this recording. This could be due to audio quality issues, an unsupported audio format, or a temporary service issue.
transcription.copyNotSupported: Copy is not supported in this browser
transcription.changeSpeakerDescription: Select a different speaker for this sentence
transcription.jumpToTimestamp: Jump to this moment in the recording
transcription.name: Name
transcription.selectNoUserHint: Select "No user" to add an external speaker with only a name.
transcription.speakerNameInvalid: Name may only contain letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and periods

transcriptionHistory.title: Transcription History
transcriptionHistory.description: View previous versions of the transcription and restore if needed
transcriptionHistory.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to revert to version {number}? This will create a new version.

gmail.gmailDraftDescription: Create a Gmail draft with the meeting summary
gmail.additionalContentPlaceholder: Add any additional notes or context...
gmail.additionalContentHint: This will be added before the meeting summary
gmail.gmailNote: The draft will include the recording title, date, duration, and full summary. Recipients (To/CC) are left blank for you to fill in.
gmail.draftSaved: The email draft has been saved to your Gmail drafts folder

userNotes.placeholder: Add your notes here... You can use markdown formatting.

processingError.title: Processing Failed
processingError.defaultMessage: There was an error processing this recording. This could be due to an unsupported file format, corrupted file, or a temporary service issue.
processingError.tip1: Verify the file is not corrupted and try uploading again
processingError.tip2: Ensure the file format is supported (mp3, mp4, wav, m4a)
processingError.tip3: Check if the file size is within limits (max 100MB)
processingError.tip4: Contact support if the issue persists

detail.taskExtractionInProgress: Task extraction may still be in progress
detail.actionItemsAfterTranscription: Action items will be extracted after transcription completes
detail.waitForTranscription: Please wait for the transcription to finish

toast.transcriptionCompletedDescription: The recording has been successfully processed
toast.transcriptionFailedDescription: There was an error processing this recording

selection.recordingsSelected: {count, plural, one {# recording} other {# recordings}} selected

list.noRecordingsSearch: No recordings found matching your search

autoProcess.title: Live recording processing
autoProcess.description: Manage automatic AI processing for live recordings
autoProcess.autoProcessDescription: Automatically start AI processing (transcription, summary, tasks) after saving a live recording
autoProcess.enabledDescription: Live recordings will be automatically processed after saving
autoProcess.disabledDescription: You can start processing manually per recording
autoProcess.noteItem1: This setting only applies to live recordings
autoProcess.noteItem2: Uploaded files are always processed automatically
autoProcess.noteItem3: You can always start processing manually if auto-processing is disabled
